hero.title: Turn Negative Reviews Into Loyal Customers
hero.subtitle: The AI assistant that helps restaurant owners respond to customer reviews professionally, empathetically, and in one click.

features.title: Everything You Need
features.subtitle: Simple and powerful tools to manage your online reputation.

sentiment.title: Sentiment Detection
sentiment.description: AI automatically analyzes each review to identify the tone — positive, neutral, or negative — and prioritizes urgent responses.

response.title: AI-Generated Responses
response.description: Get professional, empathetic responses in seconds, tailored to the specific context of each review.

copy.title: One-Click Copy & Send
copy.description: Copy the generated response and paste it directly on Google, TripAdvisor, or any other review platform.

howItWorks.title: How It Works
howItWorks.subtitle: Three simple steps to respond like a pro.

step1.title: Paste the Review
step1.description: Copy the customer review from Google, TripAdvisor, or another platform and paste it into our tool.

step2.title: AI Analyzes & Writes
step2.description: Our AI detects sentiment and generates a professional response tailored to the context.

step3.title: Copy & Publish
step3.description: Copy the response in one click and publish it on the review platform of your choice.

pricing.title: Simple Pricing
pricing.subtitle: Start free, upgrade to Pro or Business when you're ready.

testimonials.title: Loved by Restaurant Owners
testimonials.subtitle: See how ReviewReply helps restaurants manage their online reputation.

items.name: Sophie M.
items.quote: ReviewReply has completely changed how I handle reviews. I used to spend 30 minutes per response, now it takes 30 seconds. The tone is always spot-on.

items.name: Marco T.
items.quote: The sentiment analysis is incredibly accurate. We now respond to negative reviews within minutes, and our Google rating went from 3.8 to 4.3 in three months.

items.name: Claire D.
items.quote: The trends analysis feature opened our eyes. We discovered recurring complaints about wait times we had no idea about. Game changer for our operations.

faq.title: Frequently Asked Questions
faq.subtitle: Everything you need to know about ReviewReply.

items.question: How does the AI generate responses?
items.answer: Our AI analyzes the sentiment, context, and specific details of each review, then generates a professional, empathetic response tailored to the situation. You can customize the tone (professional, warm, casual, formal) and edit before publishing.

items.question: Which review platforms are supported?
items.answer: ReviewReply works with Google, TripAdvisor, Yelp, and any other platform. Simply paste the review into our tool. With the Business plan, Google reviews are automatically synced.

items.question: Can I try it for free?
items.answer: Yes! The Free plan gives you 10 AI-generated responses per month, sentiment detection, and one-click copy. No credit card required.

items.question: Is my data secure?
items.answer: Absolutely. We use industry-standard encryption, and your data is stored on secure servers. We never share your reviews or responses with third parties.

items.question: Can I manage multiple restaurants?
items.answer: Yes, with the Business plan you can manage up to 10 restaurants, invite team members, and get a centralized dashboard for all your locations.

items.question: How does the competitor analysis work?
items.answer: Our AI fetches public reviews from competitor restaurants and analyzes their strengths and weaknesses, helping you identify opportunities to stand out in your market.

footer.description: The AI assistant for restaurant owners. Respond to customer reviews in seconds.
